prompt: A polished studio portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young East Asian woman"} from the chest up, centered and facing forward against a smooth dark charcoal gray backdrop with subtle vignette lighting. She has long, glossy, slightly wavy {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair falling over both shoulders, with soft straight bangs and a neat center-top part. She wears a tailored double-breasted {argument name="blazer color" default="deep navy"} blazer with 6 visible round gold crest buttons, creating an elegant professional look. Her right hand is raised thoughtfully under her chin with relaxed fingers, forming a poised formal pose. Use soft directional studio lighting from the front-left, high detail skin texture, realistic fabric, gentle shadows, and a premium corporate headshot aesthetic. Compose the image vertically, clean and minimal, with the subject occupying most of the frame. In the bottom-left corner, add 1 small rectangular inset comparison photo on a white background showing the same woman in a simpler ID-style portrait wearing a white collared shirt, and place the text {argument name="corner text" default="GPT Image2"} beneath or overlapping the inset in large black sans-serif letters. Photorealistic, refined, editorial portrait quality.
translatedPrompt: 一张精致的摄影肖像，主体为 {argument name="subject" default="年轻东亚女性"}，半身像，居中面向前方，背景为平滑的深炭灰色，带有微妙的晕影灯光效果。她留着长而有光泽、微卷的 {argument name="hair color" default="黑色"} 头发，垂在双肩两侧，配有柔和的直刘海和整齐的中分发线。她穿着一件剪裁考究的双排扣 {argument name="blazer color" default="深海军蓝"} 西装外套，带有 6 枚明显的圆形金色徽章纽扣，营造出优雅的专业形象。她的右手若有所思地抬起托在下巴下方，手指放松，呈现出端庄的正式姿态。使用来自左前方的柔和定向摄影灯光，呈现高细节的皮肤纹理、逼真的面料质感、柔和的阴影以及高级商务头像的审美。画面采用竖构图，简洁明快，主体占据画面大部分空间。在左下角添加 1 张白色背景的小型矩形嵌入式对比照片，展示同一位女性穿着白色翻领衬衫的简约证件照风格，并在嵌入图下方或上方叠加显示 {argument name="corner text" default="GPT Image2"} 字样，使用醒目的黑色无衬线字体。超写实，精致，具备编辑级肖像品质。

breakdown.creativeCore: 带嵌入式对比图的商务肖像摄影：此提示词可生成一张具有深思姿态的超写实专业摄影头像，并附带一个小型的对比嵌入图，适用于 AI 模型对比文章或肖像质量演示。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, editorial, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
